items.name: MLDS
items.description: A Machine Learning-Driven Framework for Ensemble Synthetic Data Selection

items.name: ML_Drift_Detection_and_Alert_System
items.description: DriftGuard is a machine learning monitoring framework that detects data drift, prediction drift, and model performance degradation using PSI and KS tests. It includes automated alerts, incident logging, and a Streamlit dashboard for real-time model health monitoring and drift visualization.

items.name: AI-Based-Phishing-Detection-Framework
items.description: AI-Powered Phishing Website Detection Framework using Python, Machine Learning, and Cybersecurity

items.name: LDopa-ml
items.description: This repository provides data and Python code for machine learning–based optimization of L-DOPA extraction from Vicia faba. It uses CART and ensemble models to identify high-yield conditions, offering an interpretable decision-support framework for scalable and industrial extraction processes.

items.name: NOVA-Classification-Using-ML-and-NLP
items.description: Machine Learning and NLP framework for automated NOVA food classification using nutritional, ingredient, and textual features.

items.name: WB-GHG-Discovery
items.description: An automated framework for discovering the most influential World Bank indicators affecting greenhouse gas emissions using machine learning.

items.name: hybrid-sql-injection-detection-framework
items.description: A Hybrid Machine Learning and Rule-Based SQL Injection Detection and Prevention Framework for Real-Time Web Application Security.

items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

items.name: diabetes-risk-prediction-crisp-dm
items.description: End-to-end diabetes prediction system using Machine Learning and the CRISP-DM framework. Features data preprocessing, EDA, advanced missing value imputation, model evaluation, and an interactive Streamlit web application.

items.name: mGFD_Skin_Diffusion_Simulator
items.description: Open-source framework for transient 2D diffusion modeling in skin-like domains using the Generalized Finite Differences Method, featuring mesh libraries, visualization outputs, and large-scale dataset generation for machine learning and parameter studies.

items.name: FishAMR-Link
items.description: A fault-tolerant, single-module computational framework for automated epizootic plasmid risk assessment and biothreat stratification featuring topological gene proximity networking, machine learning classification, and relational SQLite warehousing.

items.name: synscreen-eval
items.description: BioGuard-Eval: DNA Synthesis Screening & Adversarial Evals. Implements machine learning, and biological safety safeguards. Builds a simulation of DNA Synthesis Screening (filtering regulated biological threats) and an Adversarial Evaluation Framework, stress-testing filters against obfuscation attacks like codon optimization and sequence splitting.

items.name: ONeSAMP_ML
items.description: Machine Learning based framework for estimation of Effective Population Size(Ne) from genetic summary statistics

items.name: Chonky
items.description: A Natural Language Processing (NLP)  framework for machine-learning workflows based in python

items.name: sports-injury-prediction-ml
items.description: Predictive Machine Learning pipeline and Explainable AI framework for sports injury profiling.

items.name: ai-malware-detector
items.description: Plataforma Enterprise de SOC - SIEM em tempo real, automação SOAR, framework MITRE ATT&CK, detecção de anomalias com Machine Learning (TensorFlow), dashboard profissional e WebSocket. Desenvolvido em Rust para máxima performance.

items.name: Automatic-ML-Implement
items.description: An automated machine learning framework for benchmarking classification and regression models on tabular datasets. The pipeline performs data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, visualization, and model comparison, automatically identifying the best-performing algorithm and generating reproducible results and reports.

items.name: predictive-maintenance-project-proposal
items.description: Demonstrates project planning for a predictive maintenance machine learning initiative using the PACE framework, including milestones, deliverables, and stakeholder-focused planning.

items.name: Python_Projects
items.description: A collection of Python projects showcasing machine learning, cybersecurity, and software engineering concepts through practical implementations, featuring clean architecture, object-oriented design, and fundamental algorithms without relying on heavy external frameworks.

items.name: matbench-discovery
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.name: genetic-programming-feature-extraction
items.description: An evolutionary machine learning framework utilizing Genetic Programming to evolve mathematical expression trees for non-linear feature extraction, benchmarking Naive Bayes and DBSCAN topologies.

items.name: HiveMind
items.description: HiveMind, a decentralized training framework designed to coordinate heterogeneous consumer hardware for machine learning tasks over local networks.

items.name: Multimodal-AI
items.description: A comprehensive end-to-end Multimodal Machine Learning Framework designed to benchmark, compare, and deploy AI models across multiple data modalities including Text, Image, Audio, Video, and Tabular/Sensor data, allowing each modality to be developed, tested, and extended independently while maintaining a common evaluation and deployment pipeline.

items.name: hate-speech-detection
items.description: AI-driven NLP framework for detecting and classifying hate speech in social media using NLP preprocessing, machine learning, and transformer-based models.

items.name: Web-Phishing-Detection
items.description: Machine Learning-based web phishing detection using URL, content, and external website features with SHAP, LIME, and an Aggregate Feature Selection Framework.

items.name: AI-and-Public-Health-Course
items.description: In this course, I have learned the basics of artificial intelligence and machine learning and how they are applied in real-world scenarios in the AI for Good space. I will also be introduced with a framework for problem solving where AI is part of the solution.

items.name: EngagementTracker
items.description: App for Garmin Fenix 7 as described in EngagementTracker: Detecting Flow and Fatigue with Garmin Wearables Using Statistical and Machine Learning Frameworks

items.name: aurora
items.description: Educational and research-oriented AI framework exploring machine learning from first principles, progressing from linear regression and autograd to attention and transformers.

items.name: PDL1_KNIME_QSAR
items.description: for Manuscript: Open-Source Machine-Learning Framework for Predicting PD-L1 Inhibitory Potency Using Curated Bioactivity Data and Molecular Fingerprints

items.name: PROTAC-Splitter
items.description: PROTAC-Splitter is a machine learning framework designed for automated annotation of PROTAC substructures.

items.name: Educational-Risk-Prediction-in-Timor-Leste-Using-Machine-Learning
items.description: Source code for my Master's thesis on educational risk prediction in Timor-Leste using machine learning and a localized Teacher Competency Framework (TL-TCF).

items.name: Rainfall_Forecasting_Jambi_TSML
items.description: A comprehensive Python implementation for hourly rainfall forecasting in Jambi City, Indonesia, using a two-stage machine learning framework that combines rainfall occurrence classification and rainfall intensity regression.

items.name: ml-football-translation
items.description: Machine learning framework for cross-league per-90 statistic translation across the Big Five European football leagues, with conformal prediction uncertainty quantification.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: OmniRank
items.description: A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms

items.name: Boro-rice-yield-prediction-and-smart-advisory
items.description: A multi-sensor machine learning framework for Boro rice mapping, district-level yield prediction, and irrigation advisory in Bangladesh using Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat LST, CHIRPS rainfall, and BBS agricultural data.

items.name: Cassette2Vec
items.description: Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)

items.name: Ecommerce-AI-Communication-Framework
items.description: Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.

items.name: machinelearning
items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.name: accelera
items.description: Accelera is a cutting-edge ML pipeline framework . It provides a robust, scalable solution for building and deploying machine learning workflows with optimized performance.

items.name: ai-mentor-framework
items.description: Personal AI framework for studying Data Science, Machine Learning, AI and MLOps.

items.name: Probabilistic-Historical-Interpretation-Framework
items.description: A scientific framework for probabilistic reconstruction and interpretation of historical texts using Bayesian inference, machine learning, and explainable AI.

items.name: sentinelcam
items.description: A computer vision and machine learning pipeline on a distributed framework. Designed for an embedded network on low voltage IoT hardware.

items.name: ml-realtime-cyber-detection.
items.description: An empirical benchmarking framework evaluating Random Forest, SVM, and XGBoost classifiers for real-time network intrusion and phishing URL detection, focusing on the precision-latency trade-off.machine-learning  cybersecurity  intrusion-detection  phishing-detection  xgboost  random-forest  benchmarking  python

items.name: IoT-Security-Framework
items.description: This project will include:  IoT traffic monitoring with Zeek IDS and Wireshark. Communication security with MQTT (Mosquitto) and TLS encryption.  Response automation with Node-RED. Anomaly detection with a machine learning (AI/ML) model.  Deployment with Docker and GitHub/GitLab.

items.name: Explainable-AI-in-Healthcare-Cancer-Dataset
items.description: Explainable AI in Healthcare: Cancer Dataset is a machine learning framework that uses interpretable algorithms (like SHAP or LIME) on oncology data to provide clear, human-understandable clinical justifications alongside its cancer diagnoses and risk predictions.

items.name: Fake-News-Detector
items.description: This is and end to end Machine learning/deep learning project which uses tensorflow framework to build an NLP and LSTM based model which processes user given text to predict whether the news is fake or real. It is also fully deployed using FastAPI to serve the model and streamlit as user interface.

items.name: mlmodel-testharnessbasics
items.description: A production-grade test harness for evaluating machine learning model quality beyond accuracy metrics. This framework systematically detects ambiguous predictions, excessive model uncertainty, and prediction flakiness, critical indicators of model reliability in production systems.

items.name: symphonyGPT
items.description: A platform developed from an open framework to help AI researchers and developers to rapidly prototype, test and deploy workflows that include machine learning models as worker components. The workflow can be invoked on command line or web service, as well as integrated into UX/UI as part of a larger intelligent solution.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Driven-Discovery-of-EGFR-Inhibitors
items.description: Machine learning framework for discovering potential EGFR inhibitors using molecular fingerprints, RDKit, and Random Forest classification.

items.name: predictive-demand-forecasting-timeseries
items.description: A structural time-series framework implementing advanced temporal feature engineering and mathematical stationarity transformations to stabilize variance. Trains optimized machine learning forecasting models to project long-term inventory and supply chain demand

items.name: AIP-G-1.0
items.description: The AIP-G 1.0 (Alzheimer’s disease, Inhibitor Predictor for GSK-3β, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting GSK-3β inhibitors for Alzheimer’s disease.

items.name: EEG-Functional-Connectivity-Graph-Deep-Learning
items.description: Graph-based deep learning framework for EEG functional connectivity analysis and brain state classification (Eyes Open vs Eyes Closed) using machine learning, graph neural networks, and statistical validation

items.name: scalable-inference-serving
items.description: A collection of APIs, frameworks, and platforms for scalable machine learning model inference serving, deployment, and management.

items.name: pytorch
items.description: APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.

items.name: google-tensorflow
items.description: Google TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework providing APIs and tools for building, training, and deploying ML models, including TensorFlow Serving for model inference and TensorFlow Hub for reusable model components.

items.name: apache-mahout
items.description: Apache Mahout is an open-source framework for building scalable machine learning applications.

items.name: streamlit
items.description: Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.

items.name: zenml
items.description: ZenML is an open-source MLOps and LLMOps framework that unifies machine learning and generative AI workflows through a single orchestration, versioning, and governance layer.

items.name: amazon-emr
items.description: Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

items.name: Drug-induced-Autoimmunity-Prediction-Using-Machine-learning
items.description: This project highlights the potential of machine learning in enhancing drug safety evaluations and  provides a reproducible framework for toxicological screening. By leveraging molecular  descriptors and robust classification techniques, the approach contributes to advancements in  computational drug discovery and predictive toxicology.

items.name: Framework-for-Phishing-Website-Detection-Using-URL-Based-Features
items.description: Phishing websites steal sensitive user information by mimicking legitimate websites. This paper proposes a hyperparameter-optimized machine learning framework that improves phishing detection accuracy while reducing false positives using URL and website features.

items.name: Bioactivity-Classification
items.description: A reproducible machine-learning workflow for bioactivity classification using Support Vector Machines (SVM-RBF) and the caret package in R, implementing and extending Max Kuhn’s classification.Rnw framework.

items.name: DropletML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for predicting droplet impact dynamics.

items.name: Geochemistrypi
items.description: an open-sourced highly automated machine learning Python framework for data-driven geochemistry discovery

items.name: Rift-Valley-Fever-SDM-Uganda-HE
items.description: This is the code for a lag-informed machine-learning RVF transmission suitability framework across Uganda spanning 2013-2024.

items.name: MILIA

items.name: -Telco-Customer-Churn-Prediction-Comparative-Machine-Learning-Analysis-Dashboard-
items.description: Production-grade ML pipeline & Streamlit dashboard solving subscriber attrition. Built on a decoupled Python framework, it resolves extreme class imbalance using scikit-learn. Benchmarks 6 optimized models (XGBoost, RF, SVM) via a live inference engine to convert variables into real-time risk probabilities & client retention strategies.

items.name: Data_Science
items.description: This repository showcases my consistent work and commits across Data Science, Machine Learning, and Artificial Intelligence. It includes hands-on implementations, practice problems, and real-world projects using modern tools and frameworks.

items.name: Real-Time-Multi-Agent-Framework-for-Detecting-Cascading-Failures-in-Machine-Learning-Pipelines
items.description: Real-time ML monitoring system detecting systemic failures across Data, Model, and API layers. Features a multi-agent architecture, synthetic drift engine (Z-score/KL Divergence), and adaptive thresholding to visualize and mitigate cascading risks in machine learning pipelines. Built with FastAPI, NumPy, and Chart.js.

items.name: Credit-Risk-Assessment-Project
items.description: Credit Risk Assessment is a machine learning-based application developed using the Streamlit framework to evaluate the creditworthiness of loan applicants.

items.name: REFLEX
items.description: REFLEX: a machine learning framework for reflexive markets, where the data distribution depends on the model. We solve for a fixed-point equilibrium between a dealer market-making policy and the OTC bond market it shapes.

items.name: mGFD_EcoRisk_Simulator
items.description: Advanced framework combining 2D contaminant transport simulation (advection–diffusion) with machine learning to classify ecological risk (Low/Medium/High) and generate dashboards, GIFs, and reports.

items.name: pixelArtist
items.description: Simple Framework to create game for my machine learning research testing AI

items.name: Smart-Fitness-Tracker-Barbell-Exercise-Classifier
items.description: An ongoing machine learning project building an end-to-end pipeline to classify barbell exercises using wristband accelerometer and gyroscope data. By analyzing raw sensor streams, this context-aware system distinguishes compound lifts like deadlifts and squats from rest periods, providing a high-fidelity foundational framework for automated fitnes

items.description: This project re-estimates residential real estate prices in Ames, Iowa using advanced data preprocessing, feature engineering, and regularized machine learning . It applies Ridge, Lasso, and Elastic Net regression models within the R tidymodels framework to optimize price estimation accuracy, interpretability, and generalizability.
